settings.intro_text: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link by email. Use that link to view the latest delivery updates securely.
settings.account_btn_text: Sign in to view your orders
settings.cta_text: Send us your name, email, and order number through our contact form and we'll help you check the status.

settings.question: When will I receive my tracking link?
settings.answer: Tracking details are sent by email once your order has shipped. If you haven't received it yet, check your spam folder or contact us.

settings.question: My tracking link is not updating. What should I do?
settings.answer: Tracking updates can sometimes take time to appear, especially right after shipping. If it has not updated for a while, contact us and we'll help.

settings.question: Can I track my order without an account?
settings.answer: Yes. Use the tracking link from your shipping confirmation email. No account is needed. If you can't find it, contact us with your order details.

settings.question: Where can I find my order number?
settings.answer: Your order number is in your order confirmation email. It usually starts with a # symbol followed by a number.

settings.question: What if I entered the wrong email at checkout?
settings.answer: Contact us with your name, shipping address, and approximate order date so we can help locate your order.
